description: Advanced app features for QuantMail, QuantChat, QuantSync, and QuantAds - including email rules engine, templates, PGP, mail merge, custom domains; chat backup, search, folders, bots, voice rooms, status, payments, mini apps, scheduling; content monetization, automated posting, cross-posting, thread analytics, bookmarks; ML bid optimization, audience network, dynamic creative, incrementality testing, automated rules
steps: Create apps/quantmail/api/services/rules-engine-service.ts - RulesEngine: createRule(), evaluateRules(), autoLabel(), autoForward(), autoArchive(), getRulesByPriority()
Create apps/quantmail/api/services/template-service.ts - TemplateService: create(), render(), listTemplates(), applyVariables(), mailMerge(), preview()
Create apps/quantmail/api/services/encryption-pgp-service.ts - PGPService: encrypt(), decrypt(), sign(), verify(), importKey(), exportKey(), getKeyRing()
Create apps/quantmail/api/services/domain-service.ts - DomainService: addDomain(), verifyDNS(), configureMX(), getAliases(), createAlias(), validatePlusAddress()
Create apps/quantmail/api/services/import-service.ts - ImportService: importFromGmail(), importFromOutlook(), importMbox(), getProgress(), mapFolders()
Create apps/quantmail/api/services/autoresponder-service.ts - AutoresponderService: enable(), disable(), setSchedule(), setMessage(), getStatus(), logResponse()
Create apps/quantmail/api/services/email-analytics-service.ts - EmailAnalytics: trackOpen(), trackClick(), getOpenRate(), getClickRate(), getHeatmap(), getEngagement()
Create apps/quantmail/api/controllers/rules-controller.ts - CRUD endpoints for email rules
Create apps/quantmail/api/controllers/templates-controller.ts - Template management endpoints
Create apps/quantmail/api/routes/rules.ts - Routes for rules engine
Create apps/quantmail/api/routes/templates.ts - Routes for templates
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/backup-service.ts - BackupService: createBackup(), restoreBackup(), exportChat(), importChat(), getBackupList(), deleteBackup()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/chat-search-service.ts - ChatSearchService: searchMessages(), searchByFilter(), searchMedia(), searchLinks(), getSearchHistory()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/folders-service.ts - FoldersService: createFolder(), addChat(), removeChat(), reorderChats(), getFolder(), listFolders()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/bot-marketplace-service.ts - BotMarketplace: listBots(), installBot(), uninstallBot(), createBot(), publishBot(), getBotAnalytics()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/voice-room-service.ts - VoiceRoomService: createRoom(), joinRoom(), leaveRoom(), muteUser(), setPermissions(), listActiveRooms()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/status-service.ts - StatusService: createStatus(), viewStatus(), getViewers(), deleteStatus(), muteStatus(), privacySettings()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/chat-payment-service.ts - ChatPaymentService: sendMoney(), requestMoney(), splitBill(), getBalance(), getTransactions()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/mini-apps-service.ts - MiniAppsService: listApps(), loadApp(), createPoll(), createTodoList(), startGame(), shareResult()
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/message-scheduler-service.ts - MessageScheduler: schedule(), cancel(), edit(), getScheduled(), processQueue()
Create apps/quantchat/api/controllers/backup-controller.ts - Backup/restore endpoints
Create apps/quantchat/api/controllers/voice-rooms-controller.ts - Voice room endpoints
Create apps/quantchat/api/controllers/bots-controller.ts - Bot marketplace endpoints
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/backup.ts - Backup routes
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/voice-rooms.ts - Voice room routes
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/bots.ts - Bot marketplace routes
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/monetization-service.ts - MonetizationService: createSubscriptionTier(), subscribe(), tipCreator(), paywallPost(), getEarnings()
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/scheduling-service.ts - SchedulingService: schedulePost(), cancelScheduled(), reschedule(), getQueue(), getOptimalTimes()
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/crosspost-service.ts - CrossPostService: crossPostToNeon(), crossPostToMax(), syncStatus(), getLinkedAccounts()
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/thread-analytics-service.ts - ThreadAnalytics: getEngagement(), getReachMetrics(), getImpressions(), getDemographics(), exportReport()
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/community-moderation-service.ts - CommunityMod: setAutoMod(), addBannedWords(), assignRoles(), createModAction(), getModLog()
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/bookmark-service.ts - BookmarkService: addBookmark(), createFolder(), tagBookmark(), search(), export(), getStats()
Create apps/quantsync/api/services/advanced-search-service.ts - AdvancedSearch: searchByDate(), searchByUser(), searchByMedia(), combineFilters(), getSuggestions()
Create apps/quantsync/api/controllers/monetization-controller.ts - Monetization endpoints
Create apps/quantsync/api/controllers/scheduling-controller.ts - Scheduling endpoints
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/monetization.ts - Monetization routes
Create apps/quantsync/api/routes/scheduling.ts - Scheduling routes
Create apps/quantads/api/services/ml-bidding-service.ts - MLBiddingService: optimizeBid(), trainModel(), getPrediction(), getFeatureImportance(), A/B testStrategy()
Create apps/quantads/api/services/audience-network-service.ts - AudienceNetwork: registerPublisher(), serveAd(), trackImpression(), calculateFill(), getRevenueReport()
Create apps/quantads/api/services/dynamic-creative-service.ts - DynamicCreative: generateVariations(), selectBestPerforming(), rotateCreatives(), getCreativeInsights()
Create apps/quantads/api/services/incrementality-service.ts - IncrementalityService: createTest(), assignControl(), measureLift(), getSignificance(), exportResults()
Create apps/quantads/api/services/automated-rules-service.ts - AutomatedRules: createRule(), evaluateRules(), pauseIfCPA(), increaseBudgetIfROAS(), getActionLog()
Create apps/quantads/api/services/competitive-analysis-service.ts - CompetitiveAnalysis: trackCompetitors(), estimateSpend(), getSOV(), getBenchmarks(), getAlerts()
Create apps/quantads/api/controllers/ml-bidding-controller.ts - ML bidding endpoints
Create apps/quantads/api/controllers/audience-network-controller.ts - Audience network endpoints
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/ml-bidding.ts - ML bidding routes
Create apps/quantads/api/routes/audience-network.ts - Audience network routes
acceptance_criteria: QuantMail has 7 new services covering rules engine, templates, PGP, domains, import, autoresponder, analytics
QuantChat has 8 new services covering backup, search, folders, bots, voice rooms, status, payments, mini apps, scheduling
QuantSync has 7 new services covering monetization, scheduling, crossposting, analytics, moderation, bookmarks, search
QuantAds has 6 new services covering ML bidding, audience network, dynamic creative, incrementality, automated rules, competitive analysis
Each service has 200-400 lines of real business logic with proper TypeScript types
Controllers and routes follow existing patterns in the codebase
verification: Run: node scripts/test.js - should pass with increased file count
Verify new service files exist in each app's api/services/ directory
